title: Quick Print Coords
description: It allows you to quickly send your coordinates to chat. It supports sending coordinates both to yourself and to other players in a multiplayer game.
body:
# Quick Print Coords

**Quick Print Coords** allows you to quickly send your coordinates to the chat. It supports both sending coordinates to yourself and to others in multiplayer.

## Features

- **Quick Coordinate Sharing**: Easily send your current coordinates to the chat.
- **Customizable Messages**: Change the template for coordinate messages via the config menu.
- **Death Coordinates**: Automatically display your death coordinates in the chat.
- **Sound Feedback**: Hear a sound when coordinates are sent.

## Chat coords to everyone
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d106bf6a0c528a3e969b18ad110bc11e65fe81b4.png)

## Chat coords to yourself
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7ad7b0f09f041474f7c5170b0e941806e2c0f91.png)

## Chat death coords to yourself
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a82eb401584e52e93df1392210c30ec49c3dde3.png)

## Config Menu
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94af69b3c1c476feccba4567877e26c327304269.png)

## Dependencies
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
### FOR QUILT 1.20.X Same mods but replace fabric api with this:
- [Quilted Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)
